codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix directly addresses the prior blocking failure: Replace Share navigation now routes through the existing unsaved-changes guard path, and added tests cover dirty-name guard, Discard-to-navigate, Keep-editing-no-nav, and clean-state direct navigation. Reviewing both diffs confirms the original bypass (`onClose(); navigate('/replace-share')`) from `c319d752...` is replaced by `guardNav('replaceShare', ...)` in `9ed246ef...`, with `confirmDiscardPending()` handling the new action.
